steps.title: Use triangle area
steps.content: The area of a triangle is one-half the product of its base and height. Here, the base is $54$ centimeters and the height is $84$ centimeters, so substitute those two measurements into the triangle area formula.

steps.title: Substitute and multiply
steps.content:
Use base $54$ and height $84$. Half of $54$ is $27$, which makes the multiplication smaller before finding the area:
$$A=\frac{1}{2}\cdot 54\cdot 84$$
$$A=27\cdot 84=2{,}268$$
The answer is A.
